ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2023 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing, Points And Authorities, Declaration In Suppor Of Motion
Off Calendar Mar-16-2023 Dismissal

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing, Points And Authorities, Declaration In Suppor Of Motion
Off Calendar Jan-11-2023 Continued To Mar-17-23 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 505

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2023 Continued To Apr-25-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing, Points And Authorities, Declaration In Suppor Of Motion
Off Calendar Jan-10-2023 Continued To Mar-10-23 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default prove-up hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:35:35 a.m. and concluding at 09:40:27 a.m.

Plaintiff Happyornot Americas Inc. represented by Lorna Walker, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Zerocater, Inc. represented by Sigourney R. Haylock, Esq.

Defendant's Counsel is specially appearing, and request today's hearing be continued to allow Defendant to file a Motion to Set Aside Default. Plaintiff objects and requests to proceed with hearing on motion for default judgment prove-up hearing.

Plaintiff's Notice of Motion filed Oct-21-2022 is blank as to the hearing date.
Proof of Service has not been filed.
Court cannot confirm notice of today's hearing.

Defendant's request for continuance of argued and GRANTED.
Court orders matter continued to Mar-17-2023 at 1:30 p.m. in Department 505 for further hearing.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2022 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-31-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2022 Continued To Oct-26-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
